source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如图所示，无限长光滑平行导轨与地面夹角为，一质量为的导体棒ab垂直于导轨水平放置，与导轨构成一闭合回路，导轨的宽度为L，空间内存在大小为B，方向垂直导轨向上的匀强磁场，已知导体棒电阻为R，导轨电阻不计，现将导体棒由静止释放，以下说法正确的是（ )

choice_map.A: 导体棒中的电流方向从a到b
choice_map.B: 导体棒先加速运动，后匀速下滑
choice_map.C: 导体棒稳定时的速率为$\frac{mgR\sin\theta}{B^2L^2}$
choice_map.D: 当导体棒下落高度为h时，速度为，此过程中导体棒上产生的焦耳热等于$mgh-\frac12mv^2$

extraction_notes: 题干原文中存在缺失参数表述，如“夹角为，一质量为”
选项是从question字段中拆分提取的

multi_step: This is a 4-option physics judgment problem with answer `BCD`, so solving requires evaluating multiple statements rather than a single direct computation
The option texts involve different concepts: current direction, motion trend, terminal speed, and energy/Joule heat
The stem combines mechanics, inclined rails, magnetic field, induced current, and closed-circuit behavior, which suggests multi-condition reasoning
verifiability: Final answer is a discrete choice-style output (`BCD`), which is easy to compare against a gold answer
Choices A-D are present in the input, so each statement can in principle be checked against physics rules
The registry passed and answer is present
Verifiability is reduced by incomplete parameter expressions in the stem and metadata/registry inconsistencies about answer type and option availability

agent_assessment.rationale: The sample is broadly understandable as a multiple-choice physics problem about a conducting rod sliding on inclined rails in a magnetic field, and the diagram still conveys the rail geometry, angle theta, resistor R, and height h. However, the stem has missing parameter expressions and option D is visibly incomplete, so the full question-answer semantics are only partially recoverable even though the answer label BCD is present.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。

field_audit_records.after_value: 如图所示,无限长光滑平行导轨与地面夹角为,一质量为的导体棒ab垂直于导轨水平放置,与导轨构成一闭合回路,导轨的宽度为L,空间内存在大小为B,方向垂直导轨向上的匀强磁场,已知导体棒电阻为R,导轨电阻不计,现将导体棒由静止释放,以下说法正确的是( )

rewrite_reports.rationale: The correct answer contains three separate correct propositions (B, C, and D), so the multiple-choice item is rewritten as three directly answerable open questions anchored to those propositions.

variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图所示，现将导体棒由静止释放。导体棒随后将如何运动？
variants.expected_answer: 导体棒先加速运动，后匀速下滑

variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图所示，导体棒达到稳定运动时的速率是多少？

variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图所示，当导体棒下落高度为h、速度为v时，这一过程中导体棒上产生的焦耳热是多少？
